{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/115633743?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/subbudvk/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/subbudvk/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/subbudvk/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/subbudvk/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/subbudvk", "id": 115633743, "login": "subbudvk", "node_id": "U_kgDOBuRuTw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/subbudvk/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/subbudvk/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/subbudvk/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/subbudvk/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/subbudvk/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/subbudvk", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41245", "cvss": {"score": 5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "### Summary

A path traversal vulnerability in `LocalFolderExtractor` allows an attacker to write arbitrary files with attacker-controlled content into sibling directories when a crafted RAR archive is extracted.

### Example

Given an extraction directory set to `/tmp/extract`, a crafted archive with an entry with the filename as `../extract_evil/file.txt` would be actually extracted to `/tmp/extract_evil/file.txt`.

### Details

The `createDirectory()` and `createFile()` methods in`LocalFolderExtractor` validate extraction paths using a string prefix.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00336, "percentile": 0.25521}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-hf5p-q87m-crj7", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-16T21:14:33Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hf5p-q87m-crj7", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-hf5p-q87m-crj7"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41245"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-20T16:16:49Z", "published_at": "2026-04-16T21:14:33Z", "references": ["https://github.com/junrar/junrar/security/advisories/GHSA-hf5p-q87m-crj7", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41245", "https://github.com/junrar/junrar/commit/d77e9a83eb721cd51f9c23d7869d0e6ad7f952d7", "https://github.com/junrar/junrar/releases/tag/v7.5.10", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hf5p-q87m-crj7"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/junrar/junrar/security-advisories/GHSA-hf5p-q87m-crj7", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/junrar/junrar", "summary": "Junrar: Path Traversal (Zip-Slip) via Sibling Directory Name Prefix", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T20:56:03Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-hf5p-q87m-crj7", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "7.5.10", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "com.github.junrar:junrar"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 7.5.10"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Junrar: Path Traversal (Zip-Slip) via Sibling Directory Name Prefix
